title: senecio tysonii
intro: Senecio tysonii, also known as Tyson's groundsel, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Senecio tysonii include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusion, where its leaves are steeped in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its healing properties.
